title: Xuan Ye
description: Interactive 3D word cloud reacting when touched. Play with it: move around it or drag its intertwined elements.

heading.text: Xuan Ye makes noise as a compass, navigating the eddies of art, music, and technology.

bodyText.text: Their practice unfolds in vibrational world-building via software, sound, image, installation, performance, publication
